requests.title: Make scrape execution observable
requests.detail: Show structured real-time output, parameters, results, and errors without decorative pills.

requests.title: Make sources inspectable
requests.detail: Open a scrollable preview when allowed and retain a direct link to the original website.

requests.title: Create reusable thread documentation
requests.detail: Track context, applied work, evidence, open queue, and inefficiencies.

requests.title: Restore the full Signal Console
requests.detail: Bring back the operational information density while keeping terminal hierarchy, source inspection, and automated safe source rotation.

requests.title: Match the dense operations reference
requests.detail: Use a compact dark command header, matrix-like data panes, a stacked inspector, and a thin symbol dock without decorative pill controls.

requests.title: Final matrix and disclosure pass
requests.detail: Make the Overview source-attempt table sortable, keep source opening direct, and move source and row parameters behind a three-dot control.

requests.title: Video-ready live run map
requests.detail: Show the complete scrape path, source decisions, produced headlines, and terminal events together while a run is active or retained.

changes.title: Added /api/observability
changes.detail: Returns persisted telemetry, active process buffer, source configuration, parameters, and inferred error events.

changes.title: Added /api/sources/preview
changes.detail: Fetches a compact readable text preview and reports response metadata or an explicit failure.

changes.title: Rebuilt the React console
changes.detail: Three compact operational views: scrape trace, source inspector, and parameter contract.

changes.title: Created thread-context-docs skill
changes.detail: Generates this factual handoff from an editable JSON ledger.

changes.title: Restored multi-view terminal console
changes.detail: Added Overview, Live, Sources, Discover, Access, Results, Categories, Failures, Trace, Archive, Schedule, Config, and Audit views via a symbol dock.

changes.title: Added automatic source-cycle and archive
changes.detail: Current category feeds are access-checked, archived with source rules, queued for audit, and replace active sources only when ready.

changes.title: Added quantitative portfolio ratings
changes.detail: Ranks evidence with 25% business value, 20% reuse, 20% technical depth, 20% proof quality, and 15% current relevance.

changes.title: Applied dense console skin
changes.detail: Reworked the React styling into an ultra-compact terminal grid; added an action-bearing overview rail and expanded the highest-value lists to nine visible rows.

changes.title: Added sortable source-attempt matrix
changes.detail: Overview now prioritizes active source readiness or recorded source-access attempts, with five sortable headers and per-row parameter disclosure.

changes.title: Added minimal source disclosure
changes.detail: Each source row opens a preview; its parameters are available only from the adjacent ellipsis menu to preserve a compact scan surface.

changes.title: Added live operator map
changes.detail: Live now presents the run as six ordered stages alongside source-access decisions, retained output headlines, and the raw terminal trace.

evidence.title: Persisted telemetry
evidence.detail: Observed r/LocalLLaMA returning HTTP 403 while web and HN ingestion continued.

evidence.title: Automated tests
evidence.detail: Endpoint coverage includes health, control center, source input validation, and observability contract.

evidence.title: Browser verification
evidence.detail: Playwright opened the rebuilt localhost console, confirmed the full trace, then opened Sources and verified 33 clickable inspectable entries with an expanded preview and direct website link.

evidence.title: Restoration verification
evidence.detail: Frontend build passed; 15 backend tests passed, including source replacement and zero-ready-source protection. Browser verified 13 dock controls, collapsed scraper code, direct source link, and plug-control expansion.

evidence.title: Dense layout verification
evidence.detail: Playwright rendered the populated Overview at 1600×1000, verified the 13-function dock and action rail, and captured output/playwright/dense-console-final.png.

evidence.title: Final responsive verification
evidence.detail: Playwright opened all 13 desktop views, captured the source-attempt matrix and mobile source menu, and verified source preview, collapsed code, direct link, parameter menu, and no mobile document overflow.

evidence.title: Live map verification and scrape
evidence.detail: Playwright rendered six run stages, twelve source decisions, fourteen visible output headlines, and the terminal trace. The operator-triggered run b0e4389d-1859-4096-a61c-a634461e368a safely aborted because all discovered Google News feeds were robots-restricted.

queue.title: Run browser inspection of the rebuilt console
Decide whether to replace Reddit source with an allowed feed
Test source previews against selected news sites
Run the first live automatic source cycle
queue.status: applied; run b0e4389d-1859-4096-a61c-a634461e368a aborted safely because no discovered source passed robots review

inefficiencies.title: Global pytest temp directory is inaccessible
inefficiencies.detail: Use a repo-local --basetemp for this Windows session.

inefficiencies.title: Some publishers reject automated or embedded reads
inefficiencies.detail: The inspector preserves a direct website link and exposes the response reason instead of hiding it.
